title: hemionitis citrifolia
intro: Hemionitis citrifolia, also known as the Yellow Lip Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hemionitis citrifolia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Hemionitis citrifolia can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal extracts have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
